textByHash.7130259141df260ef175d0fc0c1c7770c547b9ee: Well, they're supposed to look terrifying but I think they are rather cute.
textByHash.66ed5e3684dca25cd14312c501405044b4f6d4a3: Oh they'd never do that - unless I tell them to, of course.
textByHash.baf5bbc9f9121048062e6269d15f26883b224e7b: Ah, just in time for a break. Thank you.
